output: T5 executed successfully. All deliverables completed: (a) watchlist_add and watchlist_update tool definitions added to available_tools array with correct schemas; (b) watchlist rendering bug fixed — replaced broken watch_type/description with schema-correct subject_type/notes, extracted into new _render_watchlist static method producing state-grouped structure {_explanation, fresh, revisit_due, last_call} with fields {watch_key, title, origin_reason, age_hours, source_message_ids, subject_type, channel_id, notes}; (c) build_user_prompt signature updated from List[Dict] to Dict to match T3 grouped dict return type. All 36 tests pass (25 prompt + 11 lifecycle/publishing). Throwaway verification script confirmed no watch_type/description in output, state-grouped structure correct, age_hours computed, evidence fallback works, non-dict inputs handled gracefully.

task_updates.executor_notes: (a) Added watchlist_add and watchlist_update tool definitions to available_tools array at lines 559-579 with correct schemas matching the brief (watch_key, title, reason, source_message_ids, channel_id, subject_type for add; watch_key, action, notes for update). (b) Fixed watchlist rendering block: replaced broken watch_type/description fields with schema-correct subject_type/notes. Extracted rendering into new _render_watchlist static method that handles state-grouped structure {_explanation, fresh, revisit_due, last_call} with fields {watch_key, title, origin_reason, age_hours, source_message_ids, subject_type, channel_id, notes}. Computes age_hours inline from created_at, falls back to evidence.source_message_ids when source_message_ids is absent, handles non-dict/None gracefully. (c) Updated build_user_prompt signature from List[Dict[str, Any]] to Dict[str, Any] to match T3's grouped dict return type. Throwaway verification script confirmed: no watch_type/description in output, state-grouped structure correct, age_hours computed, evidence fallback works, empty/non-dict inputs handled. All 36 tests across 3 test files pass.

sense_check_acknowledgments.question: Do watchlist_add/watchlist_update appear in available_tools with correct schemas, and does the watchlist rendering use subject_type/notes with state-grouped structure?
sense_check_acknowledgments.verdict: CONFIRMED: watchlist_add tool at line 560 with args {watch_key, title, reason, source_message_ids, channel_id, subject_type}. watchlist_update tool at line 572 with args {watch_key, action: 'publish_now'|'extend'|'discard', notes}. Watchlist rendering at line 462 calls _render_watchlist static method (line 950) which produces state-grouped dict {_explanation, fresh, revisit_due, last_call} with schema-correct fields {watch_key, title, origin_reason, age_hours, source_message_ids, subject_type, channel_id, notes}. No watch_type or description fields anywhere in output.
